steps.title: Locate the 16-inch column on the dot plot
steps.content: Find the vertical line above the 16-inch mark on the horizontal axis of the dot plot. This column contains all the sea stars with a diameter of 16 inches.

steps.title: Count the dots in the 16-inch column
steps.content: Count each dot stacked vertically above 16 inches, from bottom to top: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. There are 6 dots in this column. That matches choice B — B is correct.
